[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Dorai''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He transported passengers in the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]], and liked to talk about current events while in clubs and restaurants. While he was a good source for what was happening in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], including the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Shipyard/Legends|stardocks]], Dorai did not sell the information, and was especially concerned about the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
Dorai was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. He worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], transporting passengers on secure [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] in the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]]. He was not allowed to have living quarters in the Kuat [[Star system/Legends|system]] itself, since he was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]], so he lived in a staff apartment on [[Kuat Central Plaza]] of the [[Kuat Passenger Port]] transit [[Space station/Legends|station]], just outside the system. When he wasn't working, Dorai spent time in the clubs and restaurants talking about current events with other [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], but was particularly worried about news of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="PS" />

==Personality and traits==
Dorai worked long shifts, but he had long periods of downtime as well. Although Dorai enjoyed spending time with other Duros, he mingled with the various [[Species/Legends|species]] on the Kuat Passenger Port. In his work piloting a secure transport in the Kuat system, Dorai was adept at [[Astrogation/Legends|navigating]] and operating space [[Transport/Legends|transports]], was knowledgeable about government [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucracy]], [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement]], and traffic in the system, as well as what was happening at the [[Shipyard/Legends|stardocks]] of [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. He never sold this information, however, as he preferred to trade it for news of [[The galaxy/Legends|the greater galaxy]] outside of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]].<ref name="PS" />

==Equipment==
Dorai wore a [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]] and [[Flight helmet/Legends|helmet]], and carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]].<ref name="PS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dorai was created as one of the characters to be used on Kuat Passenger Port for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' expansion ''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]'', which was written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and published by [[West End Games]] in [[February]] [[1995]].<ref name="PS" /> Dorai's name was also listed in the ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' as a common Duros name.
